\tzpentry{ID3497}{Density}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3497 introduces Density as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\[ \rho_\Lambda^{\rm (obs)} \simeq \Omega_\Lambda \rho_{\rm crit} c^2 = \Omega_\Lambda\frac{3H_0^2 c^2}{8\pi G}. \]
